description: Vertical graphic marked Labor Day 2025. The upper half is a photograph of three smiling people standing shoulder to shoulder in front of a corrugated-metal wall: a young man at left in a blue 'TowHaul' t-shirt, ballcap, glasses, and beard; a woman in the center with long dark hair in a dark blue top; and a young man at right in a blue 'TowHaul' polo and cap with sunglasses on the brim. A blue gradient covers the lower portion of the photo. Overlaid text: a small blue pill badge reading 'LABOR DAY 2025', then a large white headline in mixed italic serif and bold sans 'Making America SKILLED AGAIN!'. Below, a white rounded box shows the masthead 'The Washington Times' in blackletter and a bold headline quote: 'Labor Department awards grants to expand Trump goal of one million apprenticeships'. A small DOL seal appears centered at the bottom.
notable_text: LABOR DAY 2025; Making America SKILLED AGAIN!; The Washington Times; Labor Department awards grants to expand Trump goal of one million apprenticeships
